publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 19, 2018 at 03:17

did.unittitle: Tano D'Amico Photographs of Events in Italy

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.unittitle: The apple and the "What do" [Umbria Jazz]
Donne Povere Matte , among the books most read [Umbria Jazz]
Francesco Lorusso among his fellow soldiers [Rome]
Daddo is approaching with a gun running Paul wounded [Roma, Piazza Indipendenza]
Daddo and Paul injured trying to escape 1 [Roma, Piazza Indipendenza]
Daddo and Paul injured trying to escape 2 [Roma, Piazza Indipendenza]
The morning of the expulsion of Lama
At the Gates of the University [Rome]
Faculty occupied. Out of the Red Baron, whites, blacks or dots [Rome]
Front of the Ministry of Education [Rome]
Concentration of the parade in Piazza Esedra [Rome]
Indians at the Festival of Spring [Montalto di Castro]
Girl movement in Montalto di Castro
In the courtyard of Wisdom (On the lawns of the university) [Rome, La Sapienza University]
Party in the courtyard of the University of Rome [Rome, La Sapienza University]
The day that the agent Septimus Passamonti was killed [Rome]
Policeman and stopped may be brothers [Rome]
We are all on the loose [Rome]
Agent disguised as a protester on the day when they killed Georgian Masi [Rome]
Bologna 1977 (Girls with hoof raised in Piazza Maggiore) [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Stroke of boys and dragon [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
The movement in Piazza Maggiore (Happy Gypsies in Piazza Maggiore) [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Assembly at Palasport [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Assembly in Bologna, Dialogue [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Alice with paper headphones [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Bologna 1977 (Boy with a bicycle) [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
The square in Bologna during the conference [Bologna, Convegno Internazionale contro la repressione]
Waiting for the murder of Walter Rossi [Rome]
After the funeral of Walter Rossi [Rome]
The palace was consumed in the turn of the EUR, young workers are protesting outside [Rome]
Via Fani, the scene of mass murder and the kidnapping [Rome]
Escort policeman killed in Via Fani [Rome]
The University of Rome after April 7 [Rome]
Bliz after April 7. The wall posters with pictures of Tano D'Amico [Rome]
The University of Rome after the arrests on April 7 [Rome]
Oreste Scalzone during his hunger strike [Rome]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 18 Contact prints (over 500 images). 24 negatives attached to one of the contact prints. Approx. 500 negatives

did.unittitle: Francesco Lorusso, (the guy killed in Bologna, March 12, 1977) in the parade with military 1 contact printing (2 images), 4 negatives
Struggle Committee offsite 2 contact prints (70 images), 70 negatives
Roma 17 February 1977. Expulsion of Lama 2 contact prints (41 images), 36 negatives
Indian in assembly 1 contact print (3 images), 6 negatives
Indians and parties in the University of Rome 2 contact prints (66 images), 54 negatives
Indians and clashes at the University of Rome 3 contact prints (76 images), 82 negatives
Photographs of Montalto di Castro and unidentified locations
The capture and killing Muscio Maria Pia Vianale and Franca Salerno. Torture 1 contact print (18 images), 18 negatives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos appeared on the Manifesto of French intellectuals

did.unittitle: The turning point of the EUR 2 contact printings (5 images), 5 negatives
Montalto di Castro 1 contact print (1 image), 2 negatives
